category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a BLAS/LAPACK wrapper; official MPI page describes FlexiBLAS as a BLAS and LAPACK wrapper library with runtime exchangeable backends: https://www.mpi-magdeburg.mpg.de/projects/flexiblas
display_name_sources: Official MPI project page heading uses `FlexiBLAS`; source_facts.name is `flexiblas`: https://www.mpi-magdeburg.mpg.de/projects/flexiblas
docs_sources: Official project page is the best official documentation surface found and includes features, downloads, repository, and installation notes: https://www.mpi-magdeburg.mpg.de/projects/flexiblas
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official MPI project page lists the public git repository: https://www.mpi-magdeburg.mpg.de/projects/flexiblas
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official MPI page identify BLAS/LAPACK runtime backend switching, numerical libraries, and HPC-style usage: https://www.mpi-magdeburg.mpg.de/projects/flexiblas
